description:
What if the key to building a lasting legacy is choosing the right people? In this episode, Mart Green shares lessons from leading at Hobby Lobby, launching Mardel, and building teams with vision and purpose.

Get the free leader guide for this episode at: https://www.life.church/leadershippodcast/building-hobby-lobbys-legacy-one-leader-at-a-time-mart-green

One way to consistently make wise decisions is to make as many of them as possible ahead of time. I’ve used this strategy to improve my weekly calendar, my study habits, and even how and when I exercise. 

There’s an entire framework behind how I do it, and you can find it in my latest book, Think Ahead. You can get your copy here: https://go2.lc/YTTA 

Learn even more about how the brain works and tools for winning the war in your mind with Craig’s book, Winning the War in Your Mind: Change Your Thinking, Change Your Life. And, you can apply what you read with the new companion workbook. 
Book: https://www.craiggroeschel.com/books/winning-the-war-in-your-mind
Workbook: https://go2.lc/WTWYMWorkbook 

Subscribe to Craig Groeschel and tap the bell icon to get notified when the next episode releases. 

Craig Groeschel is the senior pastor of Life.Church, recognized as one of the largest and most innovative churches in the United States. Craig started the Craig Groeschel Leadership Podcast in 2016 as a way to bring empowering insights and easy-to-understand takeaways you can use to grow as a leader—whenever, wherever.
 
Subscribe to the Craig Groeschel Leadership Podcast on YouTube or Apple Podcasts (https://go2.lc/cglpitunes) to be notified when new episodes arrive. You can also find leader guides for every episode at https://www.life.church/leadershippodcast. 

Craig hand-picked three episodes designed to help you build a strong leadership foundation. You'll learn practical ways to influence your leaders, manage your time wisely, and improve how you communicate. Head to https://www.go2.lc/threekeys to get the episodes and leader guides sent right to your inbox.

About Craig Groeschel
Craig and his wife Amy live in Edmond, Oklahoma, where they started Life.Church in 1996. A New York Times bestselling author, Craig has spoken to millions of people at events and conferences in countries all over the world. Learn more about Craig: https://www.craiggroeschel.com/about
 
Connect with Craig Groeschel
Website: https://www.craiggroeschel.com/connect
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/craiggroeschel  
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/craiggroeschel
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@craiggroeschel
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/35447748/ 

Giveaway Terms: https://info.life.church/giveaway-terms 
 
Craig Groeschel Leadership Podcast Resources
More from Craig: https://www.craiggroeschel.com
Download Leader Guides: https://www.life.church/leadershippodcast 
Subscribe on iTunes: https://www.go2.lc/cglpitunes 
Free Church Resources & Tools: https://www.life.church/churches

Chapters:
0:00 - Introduction
04:12 - Mistakes When Starting a New Business
10:02 - How to Grow as a Leader
16:02 - Why Your Impact Is About Your Relationships
25:01 - Obsess with Empowering the Right People
32:14 - How to Steward Wealth Well
45:08 - The Power of Self Awareness
48:25 - Be a Disciplined Leader

#CraigGroeschel​ #Leadership #ArthurBrooks
